entries.originalText: Slack MCP server. Search channels, read messages.
entries.changeText: Slack MCP 服务器。搜索频道、读取消息。

entries.originalText: Claude API and SDK. Use Anthropic models in Cursor.
entries.changeText: Claude API 与 SDK。在 Cursor 中使用 Anthropic 模型。

entries.originalText: Datadog MCP server. Query metrics, logs, traces, dashboards, and monitors.
entries.changeText: Datadog MCP 服务器。查询指标、日志、链路、仪表盘与监控项。

entries.originalText: Figma MCP server. Read and inspect Figma files, components, and design tokens.
entries.changeText: Figma MCP 服务器。读取并检查 Figma 文件、组件与设计令牌。

entries.originalText: Linear MCP server. Create and manage issues, projects, and teams.
entries.changeText: Linear MCP 服务器。创建并管理议题、项目与团队。

entries.originalText: Notion MCP server. Search and read pages, databases, and wikis.
entries.changeText: Notion MCP 服务器。搜索并读取页面、数据库与 Wiki。

entries.originalText: Sentry MCP server. Investigate errors, issues, and performance problems.
entries.changeText: Sentry MCP 服务器。调查错误、问题与性能故障。

entries.originalText: Databricks MCP server. Query notebooks, clusters, and SQL warehouses.
entries.changeText: Databricks MCP 服务器。查询 Notebook、集群与 SQL 仓库。

entries.originalText: GitHub MCP server. Browse repositories, issues, pull requests, and code.
entries.changeText: GitHub MCP 服务器。浏览仓库、议题、Pull Request 与代码。

entries.originalText: Skills package domain-specific knowledge and workflows that Agent applies automatically when relevant.
entries.changeText: 技能包提供领域知识与工作流，Agent 会在相关时自动应用。

entries.originalText: PostgreSQL MCP server. Run SQL queries and inspect schemas safely.
entries.changeText: PostgreSQL MCP 服务器。安全运行 SQL 查询并检查 schema。

entries.originalText: Browser MCP server. Navigate pages, click elements, and extract content.
entries.changeText: Browser MCP 服务器。导航页面、点击元素并提取内容。
